_meta.title: BRSR ↔ TNFD indicative crosswalk
_meta.framework: Taskforce on Nature-related Financial Disclosures (TNFD) Recommendations v1.0 (Sept 2023)
_meta.note: Indicative mapping of the nature-related BRSR disclosures (water, pollution, waste, biodiversity, land, value-chain dependencies) to TNFD's four pillars and the LEAP approach. A consultant aid, not an official SEBI/TNFD crosswalk. GHG/climate disclosures are intentionally left to TCFD/IFRS S2, TNFD covers nature beyond climate.

P1-G1.detail: Board oversight of nature-related dependencies, impacts, risks and opportunities (TNFD Governance A)

P1-G2.detail: Management's role in assessing and managing nature-related issues (TNFD Governance B)

P4-Q3.detail: Engagement with affected stakeholders and communities on nature-related issues (TNFD Governance C)

P2-S2.detail: Value-chain dependencies on nature addressed through sustainable sourcing (TNFD Strategy, dependencies)

P6-E22.detail: Operations in/adjacent to ecologically sensitive areas, priority locations and biodiversity impacts (TNFD Strategy + LEAP Locate)

P2-S4.detail: Life Cycle Assessment surfaces value-chain nature impacts (TNFD LEAP Evaluate/Assess)

P6-E10.detail: Managing water-pollution impacts via Zero Liquid Discharge (TNFD Risk and Impact Management)

P6-E21.detail: Process to identify and assess project impacts on nature (EIA ≈ TNFD LEAP Evaluate)

P6-E7.detail: Water withdrawal by source, a TNFD core global disclosure metric (freshwater dependency)

P6-E8.detail: Water consumption and intensity, TNFD core water metric

P6-E9.detail: Pollutants released to water via discharge, TNFD impact-driver metric

P6-E17.detail: Total waste generated, TNFD waste / pollution impact-driver metric

P6-E18.detail: Waste recovered / circularity, TNFD resource-use metric

P6-E19.detail: Waste directed to disposal, TNFD pollution metric

P6-E20.detail: Non-GHG air pollutants (NOx, SOx, PM), TNFD pollution impact-driver

P6-E23.detail: Single-use plastic reduction, TNFD plastic-pollution metric
